---
title: "Ian Del Tredici"
image: media/headshotv2.jpeg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/iandeltredici013/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/iandeltredici
    - text: Email
      href: iandeltredici@gmail.com
---

Welcome to my homepage! I’m Ian Del Tredici, a UCSB student pursuing degrees in Environmental Studies and Ecology & Evolution. This is my professional landing page where you can find everything from my academic coursework to my personal interests. Feel free to explore!
